officialEndpointObservations.keyDiscovery: Key embedded in StoreMap/?v=1 page HTML — can be extracted via grep

parameterNotes.type: empty string — service filter, leave empty for all stores
parameterNotes.city: Chinese city name URL-encoded (e.g. 台北市)
parameterNotes.area: Chinese district name URL-encoded — NOT 'town=' as previously tried
parameterNotes.key: 40-char hex key from StoreMap page — REDACTED in this report

dataFields.NAME: 店名 (store name)
dataFields.pkey: 官方店號 (official store number, 6-digit string like '020150')
dataFields.all: 服務列表 (CSV of service codes, e.g. 'ice,SWEETPOTATO,icecream,Rpotato,hd')

officialEndpointObservations.coordinateSystem: WGS84 confirmed — px is longitude (~120-122 for Taiwan), py is latitude (~22-25 for Taiwan)

additionalEndpoints.ShowTownList: searchType=ShowTownList&city=<city>&fun=storeTownList — returns list of districts with postal codes
additionalEndpoints.ShowCityList: searchType=ShowCityList — returns empty (city list may be hardcoded in map.js)

officialEndpointObservations.familyJsDecoded: family.js (15KB) is obfuscated with substitution cipher; decoded reveals full iMap.prototype.getShopList implementation

cityLevelCounts.notes: 6 major cities sampled by fetching entire city without district filter

nationalEstimate.conclusion: Official API can supply ~4,575 stores nationally, vs current DB 2,509 (1.82x more)

scrapeStrategy.districtListApi: ShowTownList — dynamically fetch all districts per city
scrapeStrategy.keyRotation: Not needed — single key works, just needs Referer header
scrapeStrategy.outputFields: NAME, TEL, px (lon), py (lat), addr, SERID, pkey, oldpkey, post, all, road

recommendedNextStep: F5-2: Full national dry-run scrape — use ShowTownList to enumerate all 22 city districts, then ShopList per district with 500ms delay. Do NOT write to DB in dry-run. Estimated ~400 API requests, ~4,500 stores returned. After dry-run validation, F5-3 can upsert to DB.
